name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Omaha, NE – 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1928 S 67th St offers quick car title loans to South Omaha residents.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates at 1928 S 67th St, Suite 204 in South Omaha, NE, in a standalone storefront convenient for residents seeking vehicle-based loans without a credit check. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM, and closed Sundays.

At this Omaha location, borrowers can access car title loans by applying with a valid ID and proof of vehicle ownership. The staff typically completes applications the same day, with funds potentially available immediately upon approval. For service questions or loan terms specific to the Omaha area, call +1 805-427-8587.

If you live in Omaha, NE and own a vehicle free and clear, car title loans provide emergency cash when you need it fast. Bring a valid driver's license, proof of insurance, and your vehicle title to your appointment. 5 Star Car Title Loans serves the local community with transparent pricing and flexible repayment options.
pros: Same-day funding available for qualified applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000 accessible through vehicle equity
Borrowers keep their vehicle and keys during loan term
No prepayment penalties; no hidden fees claimed
No credit check required; poor credit not disqualifying
Operating since 2012 with 255K+ loans funded nationally
Licensed and regulated lender with 18-state presence
cons: APR and true cost of borrowing not disclosed on website
Title loans historically carry very high interest rates vs. traditional loans
Limited detail on consequences of loan default or missed payments
Customer review sample is small (11 reviews) and cannot be independently verified
Loan terms and availability vary significantly by state but specifics not provided
best_for: Consumers with poor credit who need cash quickly and own a vehicle
Those facing immediate expenses (rent, bills, repairs) who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Borrowers comfortable using vehicle equity as collateral for short-term funding
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best suited for borrowers with poor credit who own a vehicle and need fast cash ($100-$50,000) within hours. The primary caveat is that title loans typically carry APRs far exceeding payday loans or personal loans—rates not disclosed on their website—making this an expensive short-term borrowing option. Consumers should carefully compare costs and explore alternatives before pledging vehicle equity.
services: Installment loans with fixed monthly payments (up to 24 months)
In-person loan applications at physical locations
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1928 S 67th St, Omaha, NE. Same-day car title loans.
